title: Senior Teacher - Jamboree Education - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Jamboree Education - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jamboree Education family as a Senior Teacher in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jamboree Education:
Jamboree Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education!
